---
title: "DCA-gender-socialmedia-project"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)

options(scipen = 999)

d_socialmedia <- read_csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```

# Hypothesis
H1 gender is associated with Facebook use

```{r}
chisq.test(
  d_socialmedia$Gender,
  d_socialmedia$Use_Facebook
)
```
# Findings
Gender is associated with Facebook use, X2(df = 1, n = 2189) = 18.046, p < .001.
